untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (horizontal bottom, higher highs, trend line formation, broadening structure) cannot be expressed with point-in-time indicator comparisons. Requires multi-bar pattern recognition and trend line fitting, which are not available in the allowed indicator set. Volume trend direction (falling vs rising) also requires historical trend analysis beyond single-bar comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture upward breakout with close > prev_high and falling volume trend with volume < prev_volume. Exit condition uses 20-day SMA crossover as proxy for trend change within the 5-6 week window (hold_days_max=42). Specific stop placement and target price computation marked as AUTHOR_SILENT per original signal.
